headline: M1 research is live
summary: Codex 5.6-sol is planning the 1.7B SFT baseline, sampler sweep, deployment-sampler freeze, and human calibration intervals under the constrained compute contract.

services.name: Sealed evaluator
services.detail: Private endpoint; optimized hidden split bootstrapping

milestones.label: M0
milestones.detail: Data pipeline and GPU contract smoke test

events.title: M1 Codex run started
events.detail: The approved milestone is live on gpt-5.6-sol with high reasoning and fast service.

events.title: Sealed bootstrap optimized
events.detail: The private loader now streams the target-year FineWeb crawl configurations directly instead of scanning from 2013.

events.title: M0 approved and merged
events.detail: The passing M0 branch is on main and the M1 isolation branch is active.

events.title: M0 parked for sign-off
events.detail: Candidate 2 passed independent offline verification with Tier 1 unchanged; the research lead stopped at the milestone boundary.

events.title: Accounting defect corrected
events.detail: Candidate 1 omitted complete terminal accounting. Candidate 2 fixed status, time, accelerator seconds, tokens, and cost fields.

events.title: M0 Codex run started
events.detail: gpt-5.6-sol is live with high reasoning and fast service in an isolated capability-only environment.

events.title: Setup merged
events.detail: The reviewed research infrastructure is now on main; the isolated M0 branch is ready.

events.title: Sealed endpoint deployed
events.detail: The private 7B independent evaluator is online and its hidden test split is being initialized.

events.title: GPU gateway verified
events.detail: Authenticated budget and judge calls passed with the 40 dollar Modal cap enforced.

events.title: Sealed evaluator building
events.detail: The private independent embedder image is installing and will be bootstrapped after deployment.

events.title: Reaper deployed
events.detail: The independent five-minute budget and wall-clock enforcement job is online.

events.title: Deployment started
events.detail: Provider secret detected and service bindings prepared.

events.title: Operator secrets secured
events.detail: Capability tokens and sealed configuration stored in Modal and macOS Keychain.

events.title: Storage created
events.detail: Gateway state, checkpoints, sealed state, and sealed artifacts volumes are online.

events.title: Engineering checks passed
events.detail: Harness, infrastructure, and private evaluator suites are green.

next_action: Complete M1 planning, preregister the baseline comparisons, and run the smallest allowed plumbing smoke before any 1.7B screening spend.
